prompt_text: I arrive at an underground fighting pit
prompt_label: random "I arrive at an underground fighting pit"

localspace_list.name: The Scarred Crags Fighting Pit
localspace_list.description: A vast, circular arena carved from the living rock, its walls scarred by countless impacts and scored with deep, ancient grooves. The floor is packed earth stained dark, ringed by tiered stone benches that rise into the gloom of a high, vaulted ceiling. Torches set in iron sconces cast a flickering, ruddy light across the space, revealing a low-hanging haze of dust and the metallic tang of old blood in the still air.

localspace_list.name: Collapsed Guard Tower
localspace_list.description: A crumbling stone tower, its upper floors collapsed inward, leaving only a jagged shell of walls and a pile of rubble blocking the entrance.

localspace_list.name: Rubble-Choked Alcove
localspace_list.description: A narrow alcove filled with fallen stones and debris, the remnants of a former stairwell now completely impassable.

localspace_list.name: Sealed Postern Gate
localspace_list.description: A low, arched doorway tightly sealed with thick mortar and iron bars, its frame weathered and overgrown with ivy.

localspace_list.name: Ruined Barracks Hall
localspace_list.description: A long, roofless hall with shattered windows and a collapsed ceiling, its interior open to the sky and choked with weeds.

localspace_list.name: Fallen Barbican
localspace_list.description: A massive stone barbican that has partially sunk into the earth, its gateway blocked by a landslide of earth and rock.

localspace_list.name: Caved-In Guard Post
localspace_list.description: A small guard post whose roof has caved in, leaving only a low stone wall and a heap of broken timbers.

localspace_list.name: Blocked Arrow Slit Chamber
localspace_list.description: A narrow chamber lined with arrow slits, but the interior is completely filled with packed earth and rubble.

localspace_list.name: Crumbled Bastion
localspace_list.description: A squat bastion with a gaping hole in its side, its interior exposed but filled with fallen masonry and debris.

localspace_list.name: Sealed Storeroom
localspace_list.description: A low stone storeroom with its door welded shut and reinforced with iron bands, no visible means of entry.

localspace_list.name: Collapsed Well House
localspace_list.description: A small well house whose stone roof has fallen into the well shaft, leaving a ring of broken stones.

localspace_list.name: Guardroom
localspace_list.description: A modest guardroom with a low ceiling, a wooden table, and a few chairs. A single guard stands watch near the door.

localspace_list.name: Officer's Quarters
localspace_list.description: A spacious chamber with a large fireplace, tapestries on the walls, and a heavy oak desk. A lone officer sits reading by candlelight.

localspace_list.name: Great Hall
localspace_list.description: A grand hall with high vaulted ceilings, long trestle tables, and banners hanging from the rafters. Several servants move quietly about their tasks.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Supply Closet
localspace_list.description: A minuscule closet, its door hanging askew, revealing only a few empty shelves and a thick layer of dust.

localspace_list.name: Collapsed Gatehouse Wing
localspace_list.description: A wing of the gatehouse that has collapsed, leaving a jumble of stone blocks and splintered beams blocking any passage.

localspace_list.name: Narrow Storage Niche
localspace_list.description: A cramped niche in the wall, barely wide enough for a person, now filled with broken pottery and debris.

localspace_list.name: Blocked Passage
localspace_list.description: A short passageway completely blocked by a recent rockfall, the stones still sharp and fresh.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Window Cell
localspace_list.description: A tiny cell with a single narrow window, its interior filled with rubble and the remains of a wooden cot.

localspace_list.name: Ruined Armory
localspace_list.description: A medium-sized armory with collapsed racks and scattered rusted weapons, its roof partially open to the sky.

localspace_list.name: Sealed Chapel
localspace_list.description: A small chapel with its heavy oak door barred from the inside, the windows shuttered and nailed shut.

localspace_list.name: Fallen Tower Base
localspace_list.description: The base of a tower that has toppled, leaving a circular foundation filled with shattered stone and twisted iron.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Guard Alcove
localspace_list.description: A cramped alcove just large enough for one person, its entrance blocked by a fallen stone lintel.

localspace_list.name: Grand Banquet Hall
localspace_list.description: A vast hall with soaring ceilings, ornate chandeliers, and a long dais at the far end. The space is empty and silent.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Storage Hole
localspace_list.description: A small hole in the wall, once used for storage, now filled with dust and mouse droppings.

localspace_list.name: Collapsed Kitchen
localspace_list.description: A small kitchen with a collapsed chimney and a hearth filled with soot and broken cookware.

localspace_list.name: Ruined Library
localspace_list.description: A small library with water-damaged shelves and moldering books, the ceiling sagging dangerously.

localspace_list.name: Crumbled Meeting Room
localspace_list.description: A small meeting room with a cracked table and benches, the walls stained with damp and moss.

localspace_list.name: Guard Post
localspace_list.description: A small guard post with a brazier and a bench. A single guard sits sharpening a sword.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Watch Room
localspace_list.description: A tiny room with a single arrow slit, just large enough for one person. A watchman peers out into the night.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Sentry Box
localspace_list.description: A cramped sentry box of stone, barely large enough for a single person. A guard stands inside, leaning on a spear.

prompt_text: I arrive at a shipwright's hall
prompt_label: random "I arrive at a shipwright's hall"

localspace_list.name: The Main Shipwright's Hall
localspace_list.description: A broad, low-ceilinged hall of timber and stone, its interior spacious enough to accommodate half-finished hulls on cradles. The air smells of oakum, pitch, and salt, and the walls are lined with racks of adzes, mallets, and caulking irons. Sawdust and wood shavings cover the planked floor, and the space is lit by oil lamps hanging from beams darkened by years of smoke.

prompt_text: I approach a druidic grove hall
prompt_label: random "I approach a druidic grove hall"

localspace_list.name: Whisperleaf Gatehouse
localspace_list.description: A tiny, compact stone gatehouse at the grove's entrance, its wooden door slightly ajar and moss creeping up the walls.

localspace_list.name: The Murmuring Dell
localspace_list.description: A small, sun-dappled dell where the leaves of ancient oaks whisper in the breeze, the ground carpeted with soft ferns.

localspace_list.name: Root-Knotted Sanctuary
localspace_list.description: A small clearing encircled by gnarled roots and hanging vines, forming a natural, sheltered alcove.

localspace_list.name: Fallen Star Glade
localspace_list.description: A small glade where a meteorite once struck, leaving a shallow, moss-lined crater surrounded by twisted saplings.

localspace_list.name: The Dewdrop Pavilion
localspace_list.description: A small, open-sided wooden pavilion with a thatched roof, its floor slick with morning dew and scattered petals.

localspace_list.name: The Warden's Rest
localspace_list.description: A small, shaded alcove with a rough-hewn bench, where a lone figure sits in quiet contemplation among the ferns.

localspace_list.name: The Hermit's Nook
localspace_list.description: A tiny, cramped hollow beneath a massive root, just large enough for one person to sit, with a faint smell of old smoke.

localspace_list.name: The Weeping Willow Walk
localspace_list.description: A small, winding path lined with weeping willows, their branches trailing into a shallow, reflective pool.

localspace_list.name: The Ember Grove
localspace_list.description: A small grove of fire-red maples, their leaves crackling underfoot, with a circle of blackened stones at the center.

localspace_list.name: The Mossy Archway
localspace_list.description: A small, arched stone gateway nearly swallowed by thick moss, leading to a narrow, overgrown passage.

localspace_list.name: The Sunken Vault
localspace_list.description: A collapsed stone vault half-buried in earth, its entrance sealed by rubble and thick ivy, visible only as a mound.

localspace_list.name: The Petrified Thicket
localspace_list.description: A dense, impenetrable thicket of petrified trees, their stone branches interlocked, blocking all passage.

localspace_list.name: The Choked Ravine
localspace_list.description: A narrow ravine choked with fallen logs and boulders, its far end completely blocked by a landslide.

localspace_list.name: The Crumbled Shrine
localspace_list.description: A tiny, ruined shrine of cracked marble, its roof caved in and the interior filled with debris and brambles.

localspace_list.name: The Grand Hollow
localspace_list.description: A vast, collapsed cavern visible as a deep, bowl-shaped depression in the grove, its walls lined with glowing fungi but inaccessible due to unstable ground.

localspace_list.name: The Sealed Well
localspace_list.description: A tiny, stone well capped with a heavy iron grate, rusted shut and overgrown with thorny vines.

localspace_list.name: The Locked Root-Cellar
localspace_list.description: A tiny, moss-covered root cellar door set into a hillside, barred from within and sealed by thick roots.

localspace_list.name: The Forgotten Hearth
localspace_list.description: A tiny, collapsed stone fireplace and chimney, half-buried in soil and surrounded by wildflowers.

localspace_list.name: The Tangled Briar
localspace_list.description: A small, dense briar patch of thorny vines and twisted branches, forming an impassable wall of vegetation.

localspace_list.name: The Silted Grotto
localspace_list.description: A small grotto entrance nearly filled with silt and mud, leaving only a narrow, impassable crack.

localspace_list.name: The Lantern Alcove
localspace_list.description: A tiny, cozy alcove carved into a tree trunk, with a single unlit lantern hanging from a hook.

localspace_list.name: The Silver Stream Bend
localspace_list.description: A small, gentle bend in a clear stream, where smooth stones create a natural stepping-stone crossing.

localspace_list.name: The Canopy Loft
localspace_list.description: A small, elevated platform woven from branches and vines, nestled high in the boughs of a massive oak.

localspace_list.name: The Heartwood Amphitheater
localspace_list.description: A medium-sized, natural amphitheater formed by concentric rings of ancient trees, with a mossy stage at its center, open to the sky.

prompt_text: I stand before a printmaker's hall
prompt_label: random "I stand before a printmaker's hall"

localspace_list.name: Storage Alcove
localspace_list.description: A cramped, dusty storage room lined with wooden shelves holding old ink bottles and stacks of yellowed paper.

localspace_list.name: Main Press Hall
localspace_list.description: A medium-sized hall filled with heavy iron printing presses, their gears and levers casting long shadows under dim overhead lights.

localspace_list.name: Composing Room
localspace_list.description: A spacious room with rows of wooden type cases, each drawer filled with metal letters, and a long worktable for assembling pages.

localspace_list.name: Proofreading Nook
localspace_list.description: A small, quiet room with a single desk, a green-shaded lamp, and walls covered in pinned proof sheets.

localspace_list.name: Watchman's Booth
localspace_list.description: A tiny, cramped booth with a single stool and a small window overlooking the entrance, currently occupied by a lone figure.

localspace_list.name: Clerk's Cubby
localspace_list.description: A compact, cluttered office with a narrow desk, stacks of ledgers, and a coat rack, currently inhabited by a solitary clerk.

localspace_list.name: Bindery Workshop
localspace_list.description: A small workshop with a heavy book press, rolls of leather, and shelves of bound volumes in various stages of completion.

localspace_list.name: Supply Closet
localspace_list.description: A tiny, narrow closet packed with rolls of twine, spare ink pots, and cleaning rags.

localspace_list.name: Drying Room
localspace_list.description: A small, warm room with racks of freshly printed sheets hanging from lines, the air thick with the smell of ink.

localspace_list.name: Archives Vault
localspace_list.description: A medium-sized, climate-controlled vault with floor-to-ceiling metal shelves holding bound newspaper archives in chronological order.

localspace_list.name: Break Room
localspace_list.description: A small, cozy room with a worn wooden table, a few mismatched chairs, and a kettle on a hot plate.

localspace_list.name: Paper Storage Warehouse
localspace_list.description: A medium-sized warehouse stacked high with pallets of blank paper, the air dry and smelling of pulp.

localspace_list.name: Machinery Basement
localspace_list.description: A large, low-ceilinged basement housing the steam engine and drive shafts that power the presses, with pipes running overhead.

localspace_list.name: Ink Mixing Lab
localspace_list.description: A small, chemical-smelling room with glass beakers, pigment jars, and a heavy stone mortar for grinding ink.

localspace_list.name: Shipping and Receiving Dock
localspace_list.description: A vast, open loading bay with a large roll-up door, wooden crates, and a scale for weighing outgoing bundles.

localspace_list.name: Foreman's Office
localspace_list.description: A small, tidy office with a roll-top desk, a filing cabinet, and a calendar on the wall.

localspace_list.name: Lobby
localspace_list.description: A small, wood-paneled lobby with a counter, a notice board, and a bench for visitors.

localspace_list.name: Linotype Room
localspace_list.description: A medium-sized room filled with clattering linotype machines, each surrounded by trays of molten lead and matrices.

localspace_list.name: Coat Closet
localspace_list.description: A tiny closet with a single rod and a few forgotten coats hanging inside.

localspace_list.name: Darkroom
localspace_list.description: A small, light-tight room with developing trays, a red safelight, and reels of film hanging to dry.

localspace_list.name: Janitor's Closet
localspace_list.description: A tiny closet containing a mop bucket, brooms, and a shelf of cleaning supplies.

localspace_list.name: Cafeteria
localspace_list.description: A medium-sized, utilitarian cafeteria with long wooden tables, a serving counter, and a large clock on the wall.

localspace_list.name: Mail Room
localspace_list.description: A small room with a sorting table, cubbyholes for outgoing mail, and a postage scale.

localspace_list.name: Telephone Booth
localspace_list.description: A tiny, soundproof booth with a wooden seat and a candlestick telephone mounted on the wall.

localspace_list.name: Editorial Office
localspace_list.description: A small, cluttered office with desks piled high with manuscripts, a typewriter, and a large map of the city on the wall.
